Case Study / Montserrat Buján

A financial brand people can trust.

Montserrat Buján is a successful professional with a strong reputation in the financial banking industry.

Project Overview

The Assignment

Turn deep financial expertise into a clear, credible digital presence.

Montserrat already had the credibility — clients trusted her, results were real, and the track record was there. What was missing was a digital presence that reflected all of that. The work was to build a brand system that felt as sharp and grounded as the service itself.

Client
Montserrat Buján / BM|MB
Industry
Financial mentoring and strategic advisory
Focus
Brand positioning, identity, content direction, social presence
The Concept
"Somos el mejor espejo financiero."
The brand is built around a mirror metaphor — reflecting financial reality with clarity, honesty, and practical direction rather than empty motivation.

Strategy

From financial mentor to a brand.

The financial space is crowded with generic advice and surface-level content. The strategy was to move in the opposite direction — build something ownable, rooted in Montserrat's actual perspective, and recognizable from the first interaction.

What Needed Solving
  • Strong expertise that needed fuller online expression. The brand required language and visuals that matched the depth of the knowledge.
  • A crowded, noisy category. Differentiation had to come from a clear point of view, not just better-looking posts.
  • Trust over trend. The content system had to feel composed and consistent, not reactive.
Strategic Direction
  • Mirror-led positioning. The brand promise became financial clarity without distortion — seeing your situation as it actually is.
  • Identity-first narrative. Messaging moved from generic education toward reflection, diagnosis, and real next steps.
  • Repeatable content system. Every post, reel, and touchpoint reinforced the same idea to build recognition over time.
01 / Diagnose

Find the real signal.

We mapped Montserrat's expertise, audience, and competitive gap to identify the message that felt most true and most ownable.

02 / Frame

Build the concept.

The mirror identity was grounded in objectivity and self-recognition — a contrast to the motivational noise that fills the financial content space.

03 / Create

Turn strategy into assets.

Video, carousels, static posts, and brand graphics — all built around one consistent promise and designed to perform in vertical formats.

04 / Sustain

Build through repetition.

A recognizable presence is built post by post. The content system was designed to stay coherent and get stronger over time.

Creative Output

Built for vertical formats.

The visual system had to work on a phone first — strong compositions, clean brand cues, and content that communicated the right idea without relying on captions alone.

Case study screenshot
Reference image placed in the lead media slot for the case study.
Editorial content
Photo-led posts brought a personal, grounded tone to the brand — making the expertise feel approachable, not distant.
Carousel series 1
Carousel series 2

Results

The brand got sharper. The numbers followed.

The clearest signal wasn't one standout post — it was the combined effect of consistent positioning, stronger creative, and channel-specific execution. Both Instagram and LinkedIn moved in the right direction across the campaign period.

Instagram
0%
Reach and content interaction growth
Campaign lift included 133% growth in Instagram views, 98% growth in Facebook views, and 153% growth in Facebook interactions across the same period.
LinkedIn

Steady weekly traction from a platform built for trust.

  • 745 impressions and 424 members reached in a single reporting week — December 6 to December 12, 2025.
  • Top posts reached 289, 249, and 165 impressions, showing that the content system produced standout pieces rather than flat, average performance.
  • Consistent follower growth with gains concentrated across multiple days, driven by content that fit the audience rather than chased trends.
  • Audience quality stayed strong — concentration in financial services, banking, and advisory in the San Jose area.

What This Shows

Clear strategy. Strong identity.

This project is a clear example of what happens when positioning is sharp, the visual language is intentional, and the content has a consistent job to do. If your digital presence doesn't reflect the quality of your actual work, that's where we start.
